title: detarium microcarpum
intro: Detarium microcarpum, also known as the butter tree or wild butter tree, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Detarium microcarpum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as showing potential in managing hypertension and diabetes. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
